title: cistus ladanifer subsp. ladanifer
intro: Cistus ladanifer subsp. ladanifer is a subspecies of evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, commonly known as rockrose or labdanum. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cistus ladanifer subsp. ladanifer include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
